Second Amended Notice Of Petition And Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER PIER 39 LIMITED PARTNERSHIP's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. The court will endorse a judgment in the amount of the arbitration award, $124,063.39. Petitioner may seek post-arbitration attorneys' fees through subsequent motion.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
